title_en: The Young Man and the Lion
title_fr: Le jeune homme et le lion
recommended_usage: First story lesson; extract animal, village, forest, family, simple question dialogue.
Cultural/proverb reading later; not MVP beginner content.
Values/story lesson: school, promise, truth, secrecy, family. Adapt for children before publishing.
